name: E-Ball
short_description: E-ball is an isometric platform game where players will have to guide their E-ball towards the finish line while collecting valuable orbs and beating the clock. Race through 4 zones and 20 stages of palm sweating challenges from spiked pits of doom to fire spitting totems!
detailed_description: E-ball is a quick twitch isometric platform game that will put a players thumb skills to the test. Guide your E-ball towards the finish line while collecting valuable orbs and beating the clock. Race through 4 zones and 20 stages of palm sweating challenges from spiked pits of doom to fire spitting totems!
about_the_game: E-ball is a quick twitch isometric platform game that will put a players thumb skills to the test.
